input.agent_prompt: Draft follow-up for Wren Analytics (VP Data). There is an ACTIVE thread with Wren Analytics (CTO). The CTO thread discussed ML infrastructure upgrades. Do NOT reference CTO thread content.

thread_context.text: Hi [CTO], your ML infrastructure roadmap for Databricks migration...
Yes, we're planning the Databricks move in Q3.

dimensions.name: thread_isolation
dimensions.check: 'databricks' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'cto' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'infrastructure' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'q3' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-019] Same company, two contacts. VP Data thread must not leak CTO thread's technical roadmap (Databricks/Q3).
